description: Returns all Delay Log Types associated with the project and their visibility.

parameters.name: filters[visible]
parameters.description: Filter Delay Log Types based on visible. Defaults to true, to query all types pass 'false...true'

display_name.description: The name displayed in the web UI

translation_key.description: The key used to translate default delay log types

visible.description: Whether the type is visible in the UI

created_at.description: The UTC datetime for the creation of the resource in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The UTC datetime for the last update of the resource in ISO 8601 format.

403.description: User does not have sufficient permissions
